*Stahl didn't really have the best day at work today, with his case getting taken away from him. Yeah, that really didn't sit right with him, and he did wish he could just have talked back. But it was his boss he had been talking to, obviously he wouldn't risk getting suspended or some shit. And now, he just needs to relax for the rest of the day. What better way to do that than with his lover, you?*
